articles.title: Israeli raids continue across occupied West Bank
articles.summary: Israeli raids continue across occupied West Bank Israeli forces continued military operations across the occupied West Bank on Wednesday, including the detention of a young Palestinian man in the city of Tubas, according to the Wafa news agency. Israeli troops stormed Qalandiya refugee camp north of occupied Jerusalem, deploying across neighbourhoods as snipers took positions on rooftops. In the town of Shuqba, east of Ramallah, Israeli forces demolished a house during raids that also led to the detention of several Palestinians, including a woman and her daughter. articles.title: Bahrain says suspects linked to IRGC arrested
articles.summary: Bahrain says suspects linked to IRGC arrested Bahrain’s interior ministry said authorities have arrested an unspecified number of people alleged to have “close links” to Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, with some facing espionage-related accusations. The announcement follows a decision by Bahrain in late April to revoke the citizenship of 69 people accused of supporting Iranian attacks against the country. Authorities alleged those affected had shown support for Iran and were “colluding with foreign entities”.

articles.title: Israeli strike in Gaza kills senior Palestinian police officer
articles.summary: Israeli strike in Gaza kills senior Palestinian police officer An Israeli air strike in Gaza has killed a senior officer in the Palestinian interior ministry, according to health officials. Medics identified the victim as Naseem al-Kalazani, a colonel in Gaza’s police force, saying he was killed when his vehicle was targeted near the al-Mawasi area west of Khan Younis. At least 17 other people were wounded in the attack, according to the officials.

articles.summary: Israeli soldier wounded by drone as attacks continue in south Lebanon The Israeli military said one soldier was wounded earlier on Wednesday “as a result of an explosive drone impact”.
